creator: beyert@cs.ucr.edu
text:
Created attachment 231807
[PATCH] require runtime dependency of net/nxssh for nxssh executable

This patch, which is dependent on my PR #261941 (new port of net/nxssh), a relatively new open source implementation of nxssh from Etersoft, which adds the missing runtime dependency for the nxssh executable:

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=261941

Note that PR #261941 must be applied for this patch to work, but once applied, this fully resolves the issue in my tests.
